## Factual Knowledge

Open-Eywa is a system with a factual branch used for domain knowledge, validated claims, prior mission findings, and reusable factual context.
Source: /Users/seanross/kingdom_of_god/home-base/current_hunts/big-thinkers/open-eywa/stuff-for-agents/library/factual/INDEX.md

## Meta Knowledge

Open-Eywa has a meta branch used for planning patterns, execution lessons, review heuristics, orchestration lessons, and methodology notes from prior missions.
